title: How Anthropic Employees ACTUALLY Use Claude Code to Grow
summary: Austin Marchese analyzes four strategies Anthropic's Growth Team uses with Claude Code: automating workflows, enabling sub-threshold work, building custom tools, and using AI as thought partner. He argues Claude Code helped Anthropic achieve the fastest tech growth on record (1 billion to 19 billion in 14 months).
